summary: The diff implements most of the requested features. REQ-1 (backend claimAdminWithCode), REQ-2 (frontend 6-digit code form), REQ-3 (GallerySection on PortfolioPage), and REQ-5 (Gallery tab in AdminPanel) are well-covered. REQ-4 has a notable gap: the backend addGalleryImage does not enforce the 15MB size limit visible in the diff, and state persistence across canister upgrades is not demonstrated. The Navigation component is not shown to include a Gallery anchor/link.

missing_requirements.requirement: addGalleryImage must enforce a maximum blob size of 15MB (15,728,640 bytes) and return a descriptive error if exceeded.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend addGalleryImage function in main.mo does not show any size check on args.blob before storing. MAX_GALLERY_IMAGE_SIZE is declared but never referenced in the addGalleryImage logic visible in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Gallery image state and adminPrincipal must persist across canister upgrades.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows these as regular mutable variables without the stable keyword or preupgrade/postupgrade hooks, so persistence across upgrades is not demonstrated.

missing_requirements.requirement: The Gallery section should be labeled Gallery in the navigation and accessible via a navigation anchor.
missing_requirements.reason: Navigation.tsx content is not shown in the diff and there is no evidence the Navigation component was updated to include a Gallery nav link or anchor.

hallucinated_features.description: useClaimAdmin stub mutation that calls updateMediaContacts as a workaround
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asked to add claimAdminWithCode. Retaining a stub that calls updateMediaContacts was not requested and could cause unintended side effects.
